articles.title: RIR Power Electronics secures order from overseas customer
articles.description: For supply of 120 units of its 5kV silicon-controlled rectifier (SCR) thyristors

articles.title: Bata India Q4: Profit Falls 95% As One-Time Loss Weighs; Dividend Declared
articles.description: Consolidate revenue of Bata India advanced by 5% year-on-year for the three months ended March, reaching Rs 828 crore in comparison to Rs 788 crore.

articles.title: PhysicsWallah Q4 Results: Losses narrow 74% YoY to Rs 75 crore as revenue jumps 51%
articles.description: PhysicsWallah sharply reduced its quarterly and annual losses in FY26 as revenue growth accelerated through disciplined scaling and AI-led efficiency. The ed-tech company reported strong EBITDA expansion, rising paid users and wider physical presence, while strengthening its path toward sustained profitability and technology-driven growth.

articles.title: Signos raises $20M, expands Dexcom partnership for weight loss
articles.description: Google Ventures, Dexcom, and Blue Cross Blue Shield of Alabama backed the round as demand for weight loss tools grows

articles.title: Goldman Sachs Raises Its S&P 500 Year-End Forecast Due To...
articles.description: Goldman Sachs also raised its S&P 500 earnings-per-share forecasts for the year to $340.

articles.title: Finance ministry to review PSU banks' lending to agriculture and MSMEs on May 29
articles.description: India Business News: The finance ministry has called a meeting of heads of public sector banks (PSBs) on May 29 to review credit flow to the agriculture and MSME sectors, .

articles.title: Microfinance industry's portfolio dips 9% in April on private banks' cautious stance: Report
articles.description: The number of active loans moderated sharply by 21 per cent to 10.28 crore, indicating a preference for lending larger amounts in the industry.

articles.title: Prediction: Elon Musk Will Become the World’s First Trillionaire on June 12th
articles.description: Here’s a prediction worth marking on the calendar: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk will become the world’s first trillionaire on June 12, the reported IPO ...

articles.title: Coal Ministry to hold roadshow for gasification projects on May 28
articles.description: The Coal Ministry will host a roadshow in New Delhi to promote coal and lignite gasification projects under the Centre's Rs 37,500-crore incentive scheme

articles.title: Cabinet approves Rs 25,530 crore Sarthak-PDS scheme to modernise ration system, support grain transport till 2031
articles.description: Union Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said the decision would directly affect “80 crore citizens of the country” who receive monthly food grains under the food security programme.

articles.title: Buy Mahanagar Gas; target of Rs 1352: Geojit Financial Services
articles.description: Geojit Financial Services is bullish on Mahanagar Gas has recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 1352 in its research report dated May 27, 2026.

articles.title: Asian capital surge: Hong Kong surpasses Switzerland in global wealth rankings
articles.description: Hong Kong has overtaken Switzerland to become the world’s largest cross-border wealth hub, driven by surging mainland Chinese capital, a rebound in IPO activity and rising demand for geopolitical diversification among global investors

articles.title: Urban India's record-breaking power demand is expanding heat traps, and it could get worse
articles.description: India’s electricity demand hit a record 270 GW as heatwaves, rising night temperatures and rapid urbanisation fuelled heavy air-conditioner use across cities. Experts warned cooling demand and stress on power grids will continue climbing.

articles.title: SC verdict on GST leaves real-money gaming firms staring at a Rs 92,000-crore question
articles.description: Wednesday’s ruling, backing tax demands on past transactions, could have major financial implications for the sector. A lawyer representing one of the large gaming companies involved in the dispute said platforms will now have an opportunity to individually respond to the GST department’s show-cause notices.

articles.title: Union Minister of State for Coal and Mines Shri Satish Chandra Dubey Reviews SECL Operations; Meets Chhattisgarh Chief Minister
articles.description: Raipur[Chhattisgarh]: Union Minister of State for Coal and Mines, Government of India, Shri Satish Chandra Dubey undertook a one-day visit to South Eastern Coalfields Limited (SECL), during which he reviewed the company’s operational performance, infrastructure initiatives and future growth plans. During the visit, the Minister also met Chief Minister of Chhattisgarh Shri Vishnu Deo Sai [...]

articles.title: Rajasthan petrol pump operators threaten indefinite strike from June 1 over supply, pricing issues
articles.description: Fuel price: Rajasthan petrol pump operators warned of an indefinite strike from June 1, seeking lower VAT, steady petrol and diesel supply, action on illegal biodiesel trade and clearance of pending government dues

articles.title: Premium Assam CTC tea fetches record Rs 800/kg at Guwahati Auction Centre
articles.description: Guwahati Tea Auction Centre witnessed strong demand, with Deckiajuli Tea Estate setting a new record at Rs 800 per kg for its BOPSM grade. This achievement highlights the growing global appreciation for premium Assam teas. The auction system's transparency and the Assam government's policy support are bolstering the region's iconic tea industry.

articles.title: Gig workers in a 45-degrees economy: Quick commerce faces heatwave test
articles.description: With temperatures crossing 45°C in several cities, India's fast-delivery economy is facing growing questions over worker safety, platform accountability and consumer expectations

articles.title: What a potential third straight year of balance of payments deficit could mean for India
articles.description: ANZ has pegged the deficit at $50 billion, while HSBC sees it at around $65 billion

articles.title: From being unemployed to earning nearly ₹50,000 per month: How a scooter changed the fortune of this UP worker
articles.description: A casual roadside interaction shared by Zypp Electric's CEO revealed how India's growing EV ecosystem is creating new income opportunities. A young delivery executive, previously unemployed, now earns ₹1,500 daily by delivering orders on a rented electric scooter, sending most of his earnings home to support his family.

articles.title: Iran War Pushes Construction Costs Up to 25%, Industry Seeks RERA Timeline Relief
articles.description: Key figures from major real estate firms warn that the ongoing Gulf situation could lead to further economic risks, with significant implications for the entire construction sector.

articles.title: Why Royal Orchid Hotels could be poised for a re-rating despite Q4 miss
articles.description: Aggressive inventory expansion, favourable hotel cycle, and strong balance sheet strengthen long-term growth visibility

articles.title: Finolex Industries shares jump 8% after Q4 profit surges 59% YoY; stock rallies 20% in a week
articles.description: Finolex Industries shares jumped after the company reported strong Q4FY26 earnings, supported by higher margins and solid operational performance. Consolidated net profit rose 59% year-on-year to Rs 261 crore in the March quarter, compared with Rs 164.58 crore a year earlier.

articles.title: Farmer bodies flay fuel, fertiliser, aqua feed price rises in Andhra Pradesh
articles.description: Koulu Rythu Sangham and tenant farmers' bodies seek affordable fuel, urea cards for tenant farmers and a rollback of aquaculture feed prices in AP.

articles.title: Why FIIs may continue to avoid India - Kotak explains, flags key risks for stock markets
articles.description: Kotak Institutional Equities has said Indian markets may continue to see muted foreign portfolio investor inflows as the country’s external capital dependency has become more visible.

articles.title: This mysterious car button you keep ignoring could cool your cabin faster and even save fuel
articles.description: Drivers can cool their car cabins faster and save fuel by using the air recirculation button. This feature stops the AC from pulling hot outside air. Instead, it recycles cooler air already inside. This reduces the workload on the AC compressor. Using this button is ideal for quick cooling after parking in the sun.

articles.title: Bitcoin hovers near $75,400 as recovery momentum weakens below key resistance
articles.description: Bitcoin is trading near $75,400, showing weakened recovery momentum below a crucial resistance level. Ethereum and major altcoins also experienced declines. Market sentiment has shifted to extreme fear. Experts suggest Bitcoin needs to reclaim higher levels for a stronger recovery. Global crypto market capitalization has edged down. Geopolitical concerns and ETF outflows are impacting prices.

articles.title: Ceat flags near-term margin pressure; brokerages split on outlook
articles.description: Ceat laid out its growth and margin roadmap at its investor meet held on 26 May 2026, flagging near-term pressure from raw material cost inflation

articles.title: What Is Forex Trading and Why the Indian Rupee Hitting a Record Low at 95 Makes It Matter More Than Ever
articles.description: Discover what forex trading is and why the Indian rupee hitting a record low past 95 against the US dollar impacts daily life, imports, and traders in India.

articles.description: Shares of 12 companies including Advani Hotels & Resorts, Bajaj Auto, Bank of India, BCPL Railway Infrastructure, Eris Lifesciences, GSK Pharma, Home First Finance, ICICI Lombard, JB Chemicals, S...

articles.title: ​Info Edge among 5 stocks showing bullish RSI upswing
articles.description: On May 26, five Nifty500 stocks that gained over 4% were identified using the RSI Trending Up scan by StockEdge.com. An uptrend signal is generated when the RSI value crosses above 50 from lower levels. “RSI trending up” indicates improving momentum, suggesting strengthening price action and potential bullish continuation, often tracked by traders for buying opportunities.

articles.title: Wall Street is booming, but Americans are pulling back on spending amid inflation pain
articles.description: A growing divide is emerging in the US economy as soaring stock markets benefit wealthier households while rising fuel and grocery prices force millions of Americans to cut back on daily spending.

articles.title: Why do experts see gold trading between ₹1.5–1.8 lakh through 2026?
articles.description: Domestic gold prices in India have surged nearly 20% this year, supported by a weaker rupee and higher customs duties. However, slowing ETF inflows and softer investment sentiment have prompted ICICI Bank to project a consolidation phase, with gold expected to trade between ₹1.5–1.8 lakh per 10 grams through 2026.

articles.title: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex, Nifty50 open flat in trade on mixed global cues; Asian stocks rise
articles.description: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex and Nifty50 saw a muted start to the session on Wednesday. Analysts believe domestic equities could conti

articles.title: Adanis set up largest single-site battery storage outside China
articles.description: Adani Green Energy has commissioned a massive 3.37 GWh battery storage system in Khavda, Gujarat. This is the world's largest single-location battery storage outside China. The project was completed rapidly, enhancing grid reliability and enabling round-the-clock renewable power. Adani Green Energy plans significant future expansion of its battery storage capacity.

articles.title: KEC International secures new orders worth Rs 1,303 cr across businesses
articles.description: KEC International announced that it has secured new orders worth Rs 1,303 crore across multiple business segments, including Transmission & Distribution (T&D), Civil, Renewables, and Cables & Conductors.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel Prices Remain Elevated on May 27, 2026; Check Rates In Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata & More
articles.description: Fuel prices in major Indian cities remain high due to volatile global crude oil markets. This volatility stems from geopolitical tensions involving Iran and concerns over the Strait of Hormuz, a critical oil shipping route. As a major importer, India is sensitive to these fluctuations.

articles.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Markets Likely To Open Flat Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Deal
articles.description: Sensex Today, Stock Market, Nifty, Share Market Live News Updates

articles.title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: GIFT Nifty indicates a flat start; US, Asian markets gain
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit record closing highs on Tuesday, as AI-fueled optimism offset anxiety over Middle ‌East peace talks — concerns that were compounded by recent U.S. strikes on Iran. The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 118.02 points, or 0.23%, to 50,461.68, the S&P 500 gained 45.65 points, or 0.61%, to 7,519.12 and the Nasdaq Composite gained 312.21 points, or 1.19%, to 26,656.18.

articles.title: Delhi completes over 95% of Census 2027 houselisting work
articles.description: Census 2027 houselisting in Delhi is over 95% complete, with operations ongoing in 44,435 blocks. The exercise concludes June 15 amid a heatwave.

articles.title: Delhi seeks add’l water from Haryana to maintain Yamuna e-flow
articles.description: Delhi negotiates with Haryana for more water supply via the Munak Canal as the Yamuna dries up, hoping for relief in the next few days.

articles.title: Global Market: BOJ’s Ueda warns oil shocks can trigger lasting inflation if wages and expectations rise
articles.description: Central banks must consider broader economic factors beyond isolated oil price movements, as temporary energy shocks can fuel persistent inflation if they influence wages and pricing behavior. Governor Ueda highlighted that the impact of oil price surges depends on prevailing inflation expectations and wage growth trends, with lessons drawn from Japan's past oil shocks.

articles.title: Hong Kong overtakes Switzerland as world's top cross-border wealth hub on China ties, report shows
articles.description: Hong Kong has surpassed Switzerland as the world's top global booking center for cross-border wealth, reaching $2.95 trillion. This shift is attributed to wealth from China and an IPO boom, with Asian hubs projected to grow faster than European ones. Despite this, Switzerland's diversification and geopolitical stability continue to attract significant assets.

articles.title: Global Market: Japan’s Nikkei seen hitting 69,000 by 2027 amid AI-driven rally
articles.description: Japan's Nikkei index is poised for record highs, with analysts predicting it could reach 69,000 by 2027. This surge is driven by excitement around artificial intelligence and robust corporate profits. Japanese equities have significantly outperformed global markets over the past two years. Despite sharp gains, analysts anticipate some near-term volatility.

articles.title: Sunetra holds party meet amid internal rift
articles.description: NCP's Sunetra Pawar held a meeting amid internal rifts, criticizing BJP for not returning the finance portfolio after Ajit Pawar's death.

articles.title: Puerto Rico's development agency chief resigns after claiming government interference
articles.description: The head of Puerto Rico's key economic development agency announced his resignation on Tuesday as he criticized the U.S. territory's administration of Jenniffer Gonzalez, accusing it of interfering in the department's work.

articles.title: NASA picks Blue Origin, other space firms for moon missions
articles.description: May 26 : NASA awarded contracts to space firms including Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin and Astrolab to send robotic landers, rovers and drones to support the upcoming lunar exploration missions.The U.S. space agency said on Tuesday it had awarded Astrolab $219 million and Lunar Outpost $220 million to build and del

articles.title: How to rebalance mutual funds, FDs & PF investments before retirement? Expert shares roadmap
articles.description: As retirement nears, an investor with a Rs 2.75 crore portfolio needs to rebalance. An expert advises consolidating mutual funds, shifting near-term goals to arbitrage funds, and increasing equity exposure for long-term inflation protection. The strategy aims to simplify investments and enhance returns while managing risk.

articles.title: IREN to buy Blackwell systems from Dell for about $1.6 billion
articles.description: May 26 : Data center operator IREN said on Tuesday it has agreed to buy Nvidia's air-cooled Blackwell systems from Dell for about $1.6 billion, as it aims to bring more capacity online to keep up with soaring AI demand.The deal is to service its previously announced five-year $3.4 billion cloud AI service co
